latex:
Which event is \textbf{least likely} to occur?

A. Rolling an even number or an odd number on a six-sided die, numbered from 1 to 6.

B. Spinning a spinner divided into five equal-sized sections colored red/green/yellow/blue/purple and landing on red or green.

C. Winning a raffle that sold a total of 100 tickets, if you buy 98 tickets.

D. Reaching into a bag full of 6 strawberry chews and 34 cherry chews without looking and pulling out a strawberry chew.
